question: The chart shows regional sales share. Which statement is supported by the chart data?

options.A: East has the largest market share among the regions shown.
options.B: North has the largest market share among the regions shown.
options.C: South and West together account for more than half of the market.
options.D: Central accounts for more than 10% of the market.

explanation: From the labels, East has the highest share (73%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking East is largest when relying on visual comparison.
